amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 7 in Mobile Phone Portable Power Banks

features: PD22.5W fast charging power bank: the TUXINSUN 20000 mAh portable charger can charge your iPhone from 0% to 50% quickly in just 30 minutes, 3 times faster than other conventional chargers, keep your device fully charged all day. You don't need to worry about your phone running out of power

Precise LCD power display: adopted built-in advanced intelligent digital display technology, energy display accuracy is up to 100%, which ensures you know the remaining power clearly and never miss charging in time.

Intelligent circuit for safety: Our portable power bank has intelligent integrated circuit that protects against overcharging, over-voltage, over-current and short circuit to ensure safety and reliability. This charger supports a variety of charging protocols, including PD3.0, QC2.0, QC3.0, DCP and FCP, and is compatible with various devices such as iPhone 16/16 Plus/16 Pro/16 Pro Max/15/15 Plus/15 Pro/15 Pro Max/14/13/12/11, Samsung Galaxy, Google Pixel and more.

3 Outputs & 2 Inputs This protable charge could charge 3 devices simultaneously with its 3 outputs. and it supports 2 types of input ports, you can use any of these cables to get your power bank ready to charge.
What you get: 20000 mAh, portable power bank, USB-C cable, user manual (English language not guaranteed).
